text.title: CodeQL + Copilot Autofix Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping repo host + license + surface to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf is a conclusion ref bound to a rule id.

conclusion.verdict: wire CodeQL workflow with language matrix

example.trace: eligible=true → license_ok=true → non_codeql_present=true → ai-detections-lane-for-non-codeql → codeql.yml plus AI detections for Bash/TF

text.example: Canonical traversal from root question through branches to a single conclusion.
